title: hellenia viridis
intro: Hellenia viridis is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is commonly known as the 'green hellenia' or 'green helianthus'. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are beneficial in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin issues, and digestive problems. Hellenia viridis can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting overall well-being.
